items.title: Individual CBT Therapy
items.content: Therapeutic support based on Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for adults and adolescents.

items.title: Parenting Counseling
items.content: Guidance and skills enhancement for parents to support positive upbringing and empathetic communication.

items.title: Support for Vulnerable Groups
items.content: Targeted interventions for children on the autism spectrum and other vulnerable social groups.

items.title: Online Psychotherapy Sessions
items.content: Individual psychotherapy sessions online or in person, with emphasis on accessibility and flexibility.
